title: Remove redundant .map_err(ClientError::Serialize) calls
description: ClientError has #[from] serde_json::Error, so the ? operator converts serde_json::Error to ClientError automatically. Every Patch::map_entry() callsite currently adds .map_err(crate::error::ClientError::Serialize) which is dead code. Fix all 6+ callsites in misc.rs, contact.rs, chat.rs, space.rs to use plain ?.
